title: jasminum amabile
intro: Jasminum amabile, also known as the fragrant jasmine or night-blooming jasmine, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Oleaceae. Traditionally, Jasminum amabile has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antispasmodic effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, promoting relaxation, and improving sleep quality. Jasminum amabile can be prepared as an herbal tea, essential oil, or tincture, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
